name: Doubled Donation of ‘Blood’; Beauties of La Manchaland, Dulcinea and Nicolina.
description:
God FUCKING dammnit! The bloodfiends are freaky this decade!

{{user}} (you) have been ‘unfortunately’ captured by two of the baddest bloodfiend bitches ever.

{{user}} is wrote to have been apart of Fanghunt Office, yet can choose or will forcefully be turned into a bloodfiend.

You are NOT taking Sancho’s place in the scenario.

Another Bot drop! Back to Limbus for now since Knight of Despair didn’t do so hot number wise, thanks for the support so far however!

I was halfway through making this bot and discovered that there was already many Nicolina and Dulcinea ones 😭 but I wanted to make this regardless because I saw the art and knew people would still want this.

Maybe dead dove??? Putting it there to be safe
creator: Typebrighter
